items.title: ‘A high ceiling’: Newcastle confirm £43m signing of Hoffenheim winger Touré
items.summary: Côte d’Ivoire international is second summer arrival ‘I am very excited to play at St James’ Park,’ he says Bazoumana Touré has completed a £43m move to Newcastle from Hoffenheim. The 20-year-old Côte d’Ivoire winger is Eddie Howe’s second signing of the summer after the former Reims goalkeeper Ewen

items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo makes bombshell retirement announcement as Portugal star, 41, confirms this is his last World Cup
items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO has confirmed this will be his last World Cup ahead of Portugal's showdown with Spain. items.title: 'It's on us' - Mercedes accept blame for Antonelli damage
items.summary: Mercedes have accepted the blame for Kimi Antonelli's mechanical failure which likely cost him victory at the British Grand Prix and saw him score no points in the Silverstone race.

items.title: Ecclestone FURIOUS after being denied Australian wicket!
items.summary: Sophie Ecclestone was denied a catch after a lengthy check deemed that the ball touched the ground first.

items.title: Two in the bin! | O'Neill and Welsby both sent to the sin-bin as tempers flare...again!
items.summary: Brad O'Neill and Jack Welsby both sent to the sin-bin as tempers flare between Wigan and Saints.

items.title: Australia romp past England to secure seventh Women's T20 World Cup title
items.summary: Australia dashed England's hopes of a first Women's T20 World Cup win in 17 years and second overall as they romped to a seven-wicket victory at Lord's to secure a record-extending seventh title.

items.title: Osaka knocks Sabalenka out of Wimbledon as Djokovic tops Federer record
items.summary: Naomi Osaka knocked top seed Aryna Sabalenka out of Wimbledon on Sunday, while Novak Djokovic broke Roger Federer's record for match victories at the All England Club.

items.title: Wigan see off St Helens in tense final match of Magic Weekend
items.summary: Highlights of the Super League match between Wigan Warriors and St Helens.

items.title: Spence muscle problem adds to England right-back concerns
items.summary: Djed Spence complains of a muscular niggle before the last-16 World Cup tie against Mexico, adding to England's concerns at right-back.

items.title: Trump thanks Fifa after USA striker Balogun's ban suspended
items.summary: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.

items.title: BBC offers 'Stay Up or Catch Up' for England v Mexico
items.summary: The BBC will be launching a special 'Stay Up or Catch Up' offer for its live coverage of England's game against Mexico at the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Mexico fans FAIL in attempts to sabotage England star’s preparations for huge World Cup showdown at Azteca
items.summary: MEXICO supporters failed in their attempt to wake up the England players on Saturday night - despite playing loud music and setting fireworks off. Footage shared on social media appeared to show a large group of fans standing directly outside the team hotel while playing live music and shooting fire
